From the history, I observed that when A doubled (1 to 2) and B stayed constant (2), Y2 doubled (2 to 4). This suggests Y2 is proportional to A. When B changed from 2 to 1 (halving) while A stayed 2, Y2 halved (4 to 2). This suggests Y2 is proportional to B. When B changed from 1 to 0, Y2 became 0.
